objective: Add reasoning-effort selector to sub-agent delegation (injectionEffort config + /api/injection-model effort + delegation prompt effort instruction + Dashboard effort Select + i18n en/ko/zh + tests + devlog/260710_injection_effort)

workPhases.title: injectionEffort end-to-end (config + API + prompt + GUI + i18n + tests + devlog)

criteria.scenario: PUT {model, effort} then GET /api/injection-model returns the effort; invalid effort rejected/cleared; clearing model clears effort
criteria.capturedEvidence: tests/injection-model-api.test.ts: 5 pass (roundtrip, 400 on invalid, effort-clear, model-clear cascades, absent-key unchanged) — bun test 260710

criteria.scenario: Delegation prompt names reasoning_effort when model+effort configured; unchanged when effort unset; effort alone does not relax max/ultra gate
criteria.expectedEvidence: bun test multi-agent-compat output incl. rendered prompt assertion
criteria.capturedEvidence: tests/multi-agent-compat.test.ts: 19 pass incl. 'reasoning_effort argument of spawn_agent to exactly "xhigh"' assertion and gate-preserved tests — bun test 260710

criteria.scenario: Full bun test suite has no new failures vs baseline; gui typecheck/build passes
criteria.expectedEvidence: bun test + gui build command outputs
criteria.capturedEvidence: baseline 1816 pass/0 fail; post-change 1824 pass/0 fail (184 files); bunx tsc --noEmit exit 0; gui bun run build '✓ built in 92ms'

criteria.scenario: Devlog unit devlog/260710_injection_effort exists recording design, mechanism, files, evidence
